version: v2 — corrected from v1 (v1 had false coverage counts; broken feeds were counted as enabled)

phase0_findings.near_duplicate_explanation: 39 × 'FDA MDR: POWERED LASER SURGICAL INSTRUMENT' — different MDR report numbers, same device type. Dedup key (source_type, external_id) is technically correct; the problem is display-layer aggregation in ingest-openfda. NOT deleted — legitimate FDA data. Needs display-layer dedup in future WO.
phase0_findings.impact_score_bug_detail: impact_score, vertical, topic, tier_min all absent from IntelligenceSignal type (types.ts) and absent from rowToSignal() return object in useIntelligence.ts. DB selects them correctly but they were silently dropped before reaching UI sort/filter logic.
phase0_findings.pipeline_zero_signal_cause: feed-orchestrator runs hourly via pg_cron but produces 0 signals from data_feed path. Root cause: 33 feeds with HTTP 404 (stale URLs), 19 feeds with HTTP 403 (bot-blocked), 29 timeout/network errors. 11 feeds return HTTP 200 but 0 parseable items (Atom format or sparse publication schedule).
phase0_findings.source_url_note: Migration 20260313000020 added source_url column in prior session. Bug was real but was already applied to DB.

1_test_record_deleted.evidence: DELETE WHERE id = '3d8a096d-9fed-430f-9bbb-5ba31ec0afe8' returned 1 row deleted. test_records_remaining=0 confirmed by post-delete query.

2_impact_score_type_fix.change: Added impact_score, vertical, topic, tier_min to IntelligenceSignal interface

changes: Added source_name, source_url to MarketSignalRow interface
Extended SELECT query to include source_name, source_url
rowToSignal() now maps: impact_score, vertical, topic, tier_min, source_url, source_name (with DB column priority over derived fallback)

url_corrections: FTC Consumer News → correct press-releases RSS path
FDA Cosmetics Updates → FDA MedWatch safety alerts path
PubMed Dermatology → valid search RSS URL
American Spa Magazine → main RSS (americanspa.com/rss.xml) replacing broken tag-specific URL

5_build_gate.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit: no output (clean). npm run build: ✓ built in 5.79s

coverage_gates_post_fix.note: Disabling 13 broken feeds (bot-blocked + confirmed 404) dropped medspa count below threshold. This is the correct trade-off — 12 medspa feeds that were registered but never produced a single signal in any run do not count as coverage.

medspa_enabled.delta_from_prior_v1: was 33 (12 broken feeds counted); now 21 after removing permanently broken

coverage_gates_post_fix.overall: FAIL — medspa gate not met (21 vs ≥30). Prior v1 proof JSON counted 33 but 12 of those were broken from day 1 and never produced a signal.

signal_state_post_fix.safety_dominance_note: 63.8% of signals are topic=safety (FDA MDR records). This will rebalance as working RSS feeds begin producing signals across other topics.

feed_health_post_fix.zero_signal_root_cause: 10 healthy feeds (200 OK) return 0 parseable items per run. Likely causes: Atom-format-only feeds, gzip encoding not handled by regex parser, or very sparse publication schedules. Requires manual inspection of raw XML from each feed.

open_issues.fix: Add 9+ working medspa RSS feeds. Candidates: ASPS (plasticsurgery.org/rss), Aesthetic Society, MedPage Today Dermatology, JCAD (jcadonline.com/feed), NIH News, realself.com feed, Modern Aesthetics.

open_issues.issue: feed-orchestrator producing 0 signals from data_feed path
open_issues.fix: 10 healthy feeds return 200 OK but 0 items. Requires manual curl inspection of each feed's XML to determine if Atom namespace, gzip, or empty feed. Fix parser to handle Atom namespace prefixes (<atom:entry>).

open_issues.issue: 44 near-duplicate FDA MDR records (39 × same device type)
open_issues.fix: Display-layer dedup in ingest-openfda: group by device_name before inserting, keep only most recent MDR event per device. Requires changes to ingest-openfda edge function.

open_issues.issue: 63.8% of signals are topic=safety — no topic diversity
open_issues.fix: Will self-resolve as working RSS feeds produce signals across treatment_trend, ingredient, pricing, consumer_trend. Blocked on OPEN-2.

open_issues.issue: 42 feeds in degraded state — pipeline generates noise in feed_run_log every hour
open_issues.fix: After OPEN-1 (new feeds), run URL verification pass and disable any feed that has failed ≥5 consecutive times with no correctable URL.

failures: 21 enabled medspa feeds vs ≥30 threshold. Gap: 9 feeds needed.
0 signals created from data_feed path in any of the last 4 hourly pg_cron runs.

overall: FAIL — medspa coverage gate (21 vs ≥30) and data_feed signal production (0) are blocking PASS. Structural fixes (impact_score bug, rowToSignal, test record deletion, type system) are confirmed PASS. Requires: (1) 9 additional working medspa feeds, (2) Atom parser fix or feed-by-feed URL investigation to unblock the 10 healthy-but-zero-item feeds.
